notes: Ground truth: /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/docs/ui-map-01-menus.csv (if present, else docs/ui-map-01*.csv) for menus; /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/knowledge/playbooks/deepchart_platform/mechanics/setup_and_customization.yaml and data_loading_and_chart_basics.yaml; /Users/flutter/Desktop/ai-support-system/knowledge/playbooks/support_matrix.yaml for feed options. welcome-to-deepcharts: friendly product tour of the main bar (New/Options/Trading/Window/About us menus), what each window type is for, and where to go next. system-requirements: Windows 10/11 64-bit, .NET, RAM/CPU/disk guidance, antivirus notes - if exact specs are unknown write reasonable requirements WITH a placeholder note '[CONFIRM: exact minimum specs with team]'. free-delayed-data-feed: the startup-wizard '15 minutes delayed data powered by dxFeed' option, adding it later via Feed Settings source 'dxFeed - 15m delayed', no credentials/agreement needed, map exchanges in Symbol Manage, the delayed banner, limitations vs live. quick-start-first-trade: capstone walking install -> license -> wizard -> feed -> Symbol Manage -> first chart -> first indicator -> enable trading panel Broker=SIM -> place first bracket order; link out at each step.
